description_long: This is a weathered stone obelisk standing atop a multi-tiered rectangular base, set within a paved area bordered by grass. The obelisk itself is roughly hewn, with a tapering vertical shaft that appears to have suffered some erosion or damage over time, giving it an irregular silhouette. The base consists of three stacked stone platforms, each progressively smaller as they ascend, with the lowest tier partially embedded in the surrounding ground. The stone surfaces are rough and mottled, showing signs of age, with visible cracks and discoloration. The immediate area around the obelisk is paved with cobblestones, and a strip of grass runs along one side, suggesting placement in an outdoor urban or park setting. No visible inscriptions or decorative carvings are present, emphasizing a utilitarian or commemorative function.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a rough, irregular shaft stands on a three-tiered rectangular stone base, surrounded by cobblestone paving and grass. The structure is aged, with visible cracks and discoloration, and lacks any visible ornamentation or inscriptions.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from a corner, highlighting the layered stone base and the rough, vertical shaft; grass and cobblestone paving are visible to the left.
description_view_1: This view shows the obelisk from the opposite corner, with more of the grass strip and the full extent of the lowest base tier visible.
description_view_2: The obelisk is viewed from the side, emphasizing the height of the shaft and the stepped nature of the base, with cobblestones and a small patch of grass in the background.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the obelisk, showing the symmetrical alignment of the base tiers and the paved area extending in front.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of three stacked rectangular stone platforms, each slightly smaller than the one below, forming a stepped structure. The lowest tier is partially embedded in the ground and surrounded by cobblestone paving, with rough, weathered surfaces and no visible decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is irregular and blunt, lacking any pointed or decorative finish, and appears to be roughly broken or eroded.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is immediately surrounded by cobblestone paving and a narrow strip of grass along one side, with no additional objects or barriers present.
